title: matricaria halleri
intro: Matricaria halleri, also known as bitter chamomile, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The plant's health benefits include reducing menstrual cramps, calming the nervous system, and acting as a natural sleep aid. Matricaria halleri can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers in hot water.
